source_caption: usydchocsoc 30w CHOCOHOLICS! WANT SOME AMAZING DISCOUNTS? 💸 🤑 Here's our sponsorships for 2025! 😍 We've finally received our NEW membership cards - so make sure to come by our future events to collect your very own card!* 💳 🍫 Finally, a huge thank you to our friends for making this happen! @bloomacarons @bubbleninitea @butterleaf.life @dulcitodesserts @fresh_and_hot_malatang @hendryscoffee @kkini_pocha @mochiric @salspizzaaus @tanghulu_sydney @topimpressionbakery Psst! Make sure to check out each sponsor's individual IG post for the specifics on the partnership 😎 📲 *Must be apart of our $5 annual USU membership! Join with link in bio! ✍️ #usyd #universityofsydney #sydney #university #unilife #society

event.description: The post announces sponsorships for 2025 and the arrival of new membership cards, encouraging members to visit future events to collect their card and take advantage of amazing discounts from partnered sponsors. Membership requires a $5 annual USU fee.

source_caption: usydchocsoc Edited • 3d ‼️WHATS UP CHOCOHOLICS‼️ Need a break from uni 📚? Assignments got you feeling meltdown mode ✏️? Come dip into happiness at our chocolate fountain next week 🍫! Psa: we’ve got LOADSSSS OF TOPPINGS (rumours says there’s strawberries 🍓 , bananas 🍌 , pretzels 🥨 , rice bubbles and more… 🤫👀) First come, First serve, before the fountain runs dry🏜️🍫 !! 🗓️ Date: 26th March ⏰ Time: 2:30- 4pm 📍Location: ISL timber floors 💰 COST 💰: Members + USU = FREE Non-Member + USU = Only $2 Non-Member/Non-USU = $5 #usyd #universityofsydney #unilife #chocolate

event.description: Take a break from uni and enjoy a chocolate fountain with an assortment of toppings, including strawberries, bananas, pretzels, and rice bubbles. The event is held at ISL timber floors and has different costs based on membership status.

source_caption: usydchocsoc 1w CHOCOHOLICS ITS TIME FOR TRIVIA ‼ 🎉🎊 Get ready to test your knowledge 🧠 , challenge your friends 👬, and enjoy a night full of laughs, friendly competition, and great vibes! 🏆✨ Whether you’re a trivia master or just coming for the fun, it’s the perfect way to break up your week! Just swing by Suwak SR 225 with your friends or join a team when you arrive! Stick around, meet new people, and see if your team has what it takes to take the win! 🤔📚 Bring your friends, bring your brainpower, and get ready for a night of trivia, laughs, and bragging rights! 🎤🏆🧠 Signups here: https://bit.ly/4urQ4ll 🗓️ Date: Friday 20th March ⏰ Time: 5:00pm - 8:00pm 📍 Location: Susan Wakil Seminar Room 225 💰 COST 💰 Members + USU = FREE Non-Member + USU = Only $2 Non-Member/Non-USU = $5

event.description: Get ready to test your knowledge and enjoy a night of friendly competition and socialising at the CHOCOHOLICS Trivia event. Bring your friends, join a team or sign up on arrival, and compete for bragging rights.

source_caption: Friday 13th March ⏰ Time: 11:00am – 1:00pm 📍 Location: ISL 💰 COST 💰: Members + USU = FREE Non-Member + USU = $2 Non-Member/Non-USU = $4 See you there… don’t get fomo! 🍫💫 #usyd #universityofsydney #sydney #university #unilife

event.description: Event on Friday 13th March at ISL from 11:00am to 1:00pm. Pricing: Members + USU are free, Non-Member + USU cost $2, and Non-Member/Non-USU cost $4.

source_caption: usydchocsoc 2w 📢CHOCSOC GOES TO MUDGEE !!! 🚗🍫 Wanna be on the next trip instead of just hearing about it 👀? Subcommittee applications close ‼️TOMORROW‼️Check our pinned post on instagram for more details, don’t miss out !! Love, Chocsoc ❤️🍫 #universityofsydney #usyd #unilife #roadtrip

event.description: Chocsoc is organizing a trip to Mudgee and is inviting students to apply for a subcommittee position, with applications closing tomorrow. Check the pinned Instagram post for more details.

source_caption: usydchocsoc 2w WHAT'S UP CHOCOHOLICS! 😤🗯️ What better way to start your Tuesday than with a FREE DONUT! 🍩🤑 This early week sweet treat is sure to make the rest of your day upbeat! 🙂‍↕️ 🎶 You don't even have to think about it, it's a no brainer to come!! 🤔🏃🏃‍♀️ No sign-up needed, just swing by ISL or stick around and have a chat with the sweetest students at USYD!! 🥰 Or show up to your tutorial in style, with your doughnut in hand, sure to make your classmates jealous! 📚🍽️ 🗓️ Date: Tuesday 3rd March ⏰ Time: 11:00am - 1:00pm 📍Location: International Student Lounge (Wentworth Building) 💰 COST 💰: Members + USU = FREE Non-Member + USU = Only $2 Non-Member/Non-USU = $5

event.description: Enjoy a delicious donut on Tuesday at the International Student Lounge. Members get a free donut, while non-members pay a small fee. No sign-up is required – just drop by and enjoy the treat!

source_caption: usydchocsoc 3w Meet our 2026 Chocsoc President: Amo! Being a constant steady and reliable backbone for our society and members, Amo brings the swag and positive vibes✨, reminding us to just keep swimming 🤿🐟 even when we’re down. Besides joining chocsoc, our best decision is making you our President! We Amor you <3! Chocsoc President Amorino Tooongart! 💝🍫

event.description: Announcement introducing Amo as the new 2026 Chocsoc President, celebrating his reliability, positive vibes, and leadership.

source_caption: Max Ma! *still not an actual doctor… YET!

usydchocsoc Edited • 2w We’re not quite sure about undefeated in drinking 🍻… but we are sure that with Dhinesh, chocsoc is undefeatable💪! With a goofy laid back aura, he definitely has given us whiplash with how trustworthy and reliable he can come to be - half of our events wouldn’t be possible without Dhinesh! Kinder Joy? More like Chocsoc’s Joy! We welcome our Joy Kindler Dhinesh Ponnappan as our 2026 Vice President! 🤗

event.description: The post celebrates and welcomes Dhinesh Ponnappan as the 2026 Vice President of the society, highlighting his trusted nature and contributions to past events.

source_caption: usydchocsoc 3w Whittaker… risk taker… mood maker 😝. If we had a penny for every time Allison had showed up and supported Chocsoc, we might be free of our debt! Just spending time with Allison heals the tit and tats we suffer through the academic semester 🥺💖. I know my life could hit the ‘sweet max’ 🍫 with a little bit of Chocsoc’s 2026 Secretary in it… Allison Liu!

event.description: A post praising Allison Liu for her consistent support of USyd Chocsoc and celebrating her potential role as the 2026 Secretary, highlighting the positive impact she has during the academic semester.
